info.name: Snowflake Function API
info.description:
The Snowflake Function API is a REST API that allows caller to create, execute and drop functions in a Snowflake database.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

request.description: Fetch a Function using the describe command output.
Delete a function with the given name and args.
Lists the user functions under the database and schema.
